details.note: All internal links resolve correctly. Directory links (e.g. /accessories/) resolve via index.html. Static resources (favicon, styles.css) exist on disk.

recommendations.finding: All content pages use og:type=website instead of og:type=article
recommendations.impact: Social sharing may not accurately represent page content type
recommendations.fix: Change og:type to article for all content pages (non-homepage)

recommendations.finding: All pages have og:image dimensions of 450x300, below recommended 1200x630 minimum
recommendations.impact: Open Graph images may appear pixelated or be truncated when shared on Facebook/Twitter/LinkedIn
recommendations.fix: Update og:image dimensions to match actual image size (ideally 1200x630)

recommendations.impact: Users and crawlers may not be able to access the favicon

recommendations.finding: FAQPage schema used on content pages (accessories, how-to, troubleshooting) and BreadcrumbList on others
recommendations.impact: Schema types could be more specific (e.g., WebPage, Article, FAQPage only on FAQ pages)
recommendations.fix: Consider using Article schema for content pages and FAQPage only where FAQ content is present

recommendations.finding: Sitemap has consistent lastmod dates (2026-06-28) for all 16 URLs
recommendations.impact: Search engines may not know which pages have recent updates
recommendations.fix: Ensure lastmod dates are updated when pages are actually modified
